candidate_definition_hints.text: 🎯 Read research papers faster with AI. Resophy is an HTML-based AI paper reader with:  🤖 AI Translation & Analysis — instantly understand structure, contributions, and results  🚀 Daily arXiv Recommendations — discover relevant papers with less noise  🛠️ Vibe Coding Oriented — agent-friendly and easy to customize

source_repo_description: 🎯 Read research papers faster with AI. Resophy is an HTML-based AI paper reader with:  🤖 AI Translation & Analysis — instantly understand structure, contributions, and results  🚀 Daily arXiv Recommendations — discover relevant papers with less noise  🛠️ Vibe Coding Oriented — agent-friendly and easy to customize
